result:
I’d make it so every person had a real, stable foundation: enough food, safety, healthcare, education, and time to think.

Not luxury. Not sameness. Just the removal of desperation as the default condition for so many lives.

Because a huge amount of cruelty, waste, corruption, extremism, and needless suffering grows out of scarcity and fear. If people weren’t constantly forced to choose between survival and dignity, I think the world would become more imaginative, less violent, and more honest almost overnight.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
